description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a neatly landscaped yard with several mature trees and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a dark, multi-gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls, with large windows distributed across the facades. The property is bordered by a low hedge and includes a paved walkway and driveway that connect to the street. The front of the house is accentuated by a covered porch area, providing a welcoming entry point. The backyard appears to have an open lawn area, and the overall layout is spacious and suburban. The house is set back from the road, offering privacy and a sense of seclusion within its lot.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, rear windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the side facade, more trees, and the hedge boundary.
description_view_3: Direct front view with a clear look at the main entrance, porch, and symmetrical landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
